evals.prompt: Create a README for this project. The repo is called aim (Agent Integrations Manager) and it scaffolds agent-engineering projects, manages reusable rules, and installs Claude skills from git repos. It already has a logo at assets/logo.png and a demo GIF at assets/demo.gif.
evals.expected_output: A README.md with a centered logo at the top, a clear tagline, a why/vision section, feature bullets, quick start, install instructions, usage/screenshots section, and contributing/dev section near the end.
assertions:
Logo appears in a centered

block at the top
A 'Features' section appears before installation instructions
Install section contains a fenced code block
Contributing or Dev section is near the bottom

evals.prompt: Write a minimal README for a tiny JavaScript utility called 'slugify-text' that converts strings to URL slugs. It has one install command and one usage example.
evals.expected_output: A compact README with a centered logo placeholder, tagline, one-paragraph why, feature bullets, install, usage, and a short contributing note.
assertions: Usage or quick start appears before or alongside install

evals.prompt: Improve the README for an existing project so it looks more trustworthy and follows a modern theme. Ask the user which theme they want from the theme-factory presets.
evals.expected_output: A polished README that applies a chosen color theme consistently, keeps the centered logo, and follows the ladder of abstraction.
assertions: README references a named theme or applies a consistent accent color
Badges or visual elements use a cohesive color palette
